subcodes.first_line: O handmaid of God! Though outwardly thou hast not attained the honor of meeting face to face and hast not entered into His presence, yet thou art the recipient of bounty [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای امه الله اگر بظاهر بشرف لقا فائز نشدی و بین یدی حاضر نگشتی ولی مورد عنایت
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual communication; connections of the heart, @stories; anecdotes, @permission for visit; pilgrimage, @love of God
